mapper.select: select a.id, a.username, a.email, a.password, a.platform_id, a.platform_name, a.test_model, a.is_collect from accounts a left join platform p on a.platform_id = p.id where p.base_url = #{baseUrl};

select a.id, a.username, a.email, a.password, a.platform_id, a.platform_name, a.test_model, a.is_collect from accounts a left join platform p on a.platform_id = p.id where p.base_url = #{baseUrl} and upper(p.type)='NEWAPI';

select a.id, a.username, a.email, a.password, a.platform_id, a.platform_name, a.test_model, a.is_collect from accounts a left join platform p on a.platform_id = p.id where p.base_url = #{baseUrl} and upper(p.type)='SUB2API' ;
